scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare -w server && concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build:render: npm run build -w client && npm run prisma:generate:postgres -w server && npm run prisma:deploy:postgres -w server && npm run build -w server
scripts.test:server:unit: npm run build -w server && node scripts/test-money-util.mjs && node scripts/test-auth-session.mjs && npm run test -w server
scripts.test:server:api: npm run build -w server && node scripts/test-server-api.mjs
scripts.fix:money-earned: npm run build -w server && node scripts/fix-legacy-money-earned.mjs
